name: RebarLapping
summary: The RebarLapping class represents the lapping of reinforcing bars at a RebarSplitter.

constructors.name: RebarLapping
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the RebarLapping class.

properties.name: LapLength
properties.summary: Gets or sets the lap length. Negative values will define a gap rather than a lap.

properties.name: LappingType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the lapping type.

properties.name: LapPlacement
properties.summary: Gets or sets the placement of the lap relative to the associated RebarLegFace.

properties.name: LapSide
properties.summary: Gets or sets the side of the split that the lap is located.
